chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلُ يُحِلُّ جَارِيَتَهُ لِأَخِيهِ وَ الْمَرْأَةُ تُحِلُّ جَارِيَتَهَا لِزَوْجِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 111 – The man permits his slave girl to his brother, and the wife permits her slave girl for her husband

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ أَحَلَّتْ لِي جَارِيَتَهَا فَقَالَ ذَاكَ لَكَ قُلْتُ فَإِنْ كَانَتْ تَمْزَحُ قَالَ وَ كَيْفَ لَكَ بِمَا فِي قَلْبِهَا فَإِنْ عَلِمْتَ أَنَّهَا تَمْزَحُ فَلَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail Bin Yzaie who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about a woman who permitted her slave girl to me. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘That is for you’. I said, ‘Supposing it was in jest (as a joke)?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And how could it be for you what is in her heart? So, if she were to let you know that rather it was in jest, so no’.
